title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories
description: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. Learners cumulatively produce a closure-based validator factory with capture tests through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace lexical name capture and cell lookup after the enclosing call returns.
Detect and repair late-bound loop variables in generated callables.
Distinguish deliberate nonlocal state from pure closure configuration and document the effect.
